nodes.name: HELMET
aliases: How to Evaluate Long-context Models Effectively and Thoroughly

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-1 pretraining for OLMo 3 32B used the released 5.5T-token Dolma 3 Mix reconstruction corresponding to the 32B run.

evidence.location: Model card, top matter / dataset tag
evidence.excerpt: Dataset used to train allenai/Olmo-3-1125-32B ... allenai/dolma3_mix-6T
evidence.explanation: Grounds Dolma 3 Mix as the subject model's training dataset family.

evidence.excerpt: The Dolma 3 Mix (5.5T) is the collection of data used during the pretraining stage to train the Olmo-3-1125-32B model.
evidence.explanation: Directly states that the 5.5T mix was the pretraining dataset for this checkpoint.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The stage-1 pretraining mix included Common Crawl web pages as its largest source; Table 4 reports 4.51T tokens (76.1%) in the 6T reconstruction.

evidence.excerpt: Common Crawl Web pages 8.14T 9.67B 4.51T (76.1%) 3.15B
evidence.explanation: Shows Common Crawl as the dominant leaf source in Dolma 3 Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The stage-1 pretraining mix included the novel olmOCR science PDFs corpus; Table 4 reports 805B tokens (13.6%) in the 6T reconstruction.

evidence.excerpt: olmOCR science PDFs Academic documents 972B 101M 805B (13.6%) 83.8M
evidence.explanation: Places olmOCR science PDFs directly in the pretraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-1 pretraining used Stack-Edu (rebalanced) as the code leaf in Dolma 3 Mix; Table 4 reports 409B tokens (6.89%).

evidence.excerpt: Stack-Edu (Rebalanced) GitHub code 137B 167M 409B (6.89%) 526M
evidence.explanation: Shows Stack-Edu as the code component of the pretraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-1 pretraining used arXiv papers with LaTeX sourced from Proof-Pile-2; Table 4 reports 50.8B tokens (0.86%).

evidence.excerpt: we include arXiv documents from the Proof-Pile-2 dataset
evidence.explanation: Identifies Proof-Pile-2 as the arXiv source used for pretraining.

evidence.excerpt: arXiv Papers with LaTeX 21.4B 3.95M 50.8B (0.86%) 9.10M
evidence.explanation: Shows the arXiv/Proof-Pile-2 leaf contributing tokens to Dolma 3 Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-1 pretraining used FineMath as the math-web leaf; Section 3.4.3 identifies FineMath and Table 4 reports 152B tokens (2.56%) from FineMath 3+ in the 6T reconstruction.

evidence.excerpt: we replace our previous use of OpenWebMath ... with FineMath
evidence.explanation: Names FineMath as a pretraining source.

evidence.excerpt: FineMath 3+ Math web pages 34.1B 21.4M 152B (2.56%) 95.5M
evidence.explanation: Quantifies FineMath's contribution to the pretraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-1 pretraining included Wikipedia and Wikibooks as encyclopedic sources; Table 4 reports 2.51B tokens (0.04%).

evidence.excerpt: we include the Wikipedia and Wikibooks sources from Dolma
evidence.explanation: Identifies Wikipedia and Wikibooks as pretraining sources.

evidence.excerpt: Wikipedia & Wikibooks Encyclopedic 3.69B 6.67M 2.51B (0.04%) 4.24M
evidence.explanation: Shows these encyclopedic sources in the pretraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining for OLMo 3 32B used the 100B-token Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix. For the 32B release, two 100B midtraining runs were performed and then weight-averaged; the same mix is also the 66.1% short-context component reused in stage-3 long-context extension.

evidence.excerpt: midtrain stage, we use 100B high-quality tokens sampled from ... Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix
evidence.explanation: States that stage-2 midtraining used Dolma 3 Dolmino Mix.

evidence.excerpt: For Olmo 3 Base 32B, we observe noteworthy performance improvement from merging two independent midtraining runs
evidence.explanation: Documents the two-run / weight-averaging detail specific to the 32B release.

evidence.excerpt: Midtraining data mix Variable – – 33.0B (66.1%) 79.2M
evidence.explanation: Shows the midtraining mix is also reused inside the long-context training mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included TinyMATH-MIND, conversational English solution discussions synthesized from MATH-derived problems; Table 5 reports 898M tokens (0.9%).

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) TinyMATH Mind** 899M 1.42M 898M (0.9%) 1.52M
evidence.explanation: Places TinyMATH-MIND in the final 100B midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: two flavors of conversational English discussing these solutions (TinyMATH-MIND)
evidence.explanation: Defines what the TinyMATH-MIND slice is.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included TinyMATH-PoT, Python-code solutions for MATH-derived synthetic problems; Table 5 reports 241M tokens (0.24%).

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) TinyMATH PoT** 241M 729K 241M (0.24%) 758K
evidence.explanation: Places TinyMATH-PoT in the final 100B midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: We then create Python code solutions ... (TinyMATH-PoT)
evidence.explanation: Defines the TinyMATH-PoT slice.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included CraneMath, AI2's permissively licensed reproduction of SwallowMath built by rewriting FineMath4+; Table 5 reports 5.62B tokens (5.63%).

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) CraneMath* 5.62B 6.55M 5.62B (5.63%) 7.24M
evidence.explanation: Places CraneMath in the final 100B midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: We denote this new mix as CraneMath
evidence.explanation: Confirms CraneMath as the named rewritten math dataset used in the mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included MegaMatt, an open-model rewrite of recent MegaMath-Web-Pro data; Table 5 reports 1.73B tokens (1.73%).

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) MegaMatt* 3.88B 6.79M 1.73B (1.73%) 3.23M
evidence.explanation: Places MegaMatt in the final 100B midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: This yields 3.88B tokens of high-quality data, which we refer to as MegaMatt.
evidence.explanation: Identifies the rewritten dataset's name and construction role.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining reused the decontaminated math subset of OLMo 2 Dolmino Mix; Table 5 reports 10.7B tokens (10.7%).

evidence.excerpt: Math (synth) Dolmino Mathˆˆ 10.7B 21M 10.7B (10.7%) 22.3M
evidence.explanation: Shows the Dolmino Math leaf in the final 100B mix.

evidence.excerpt: We include the entirety of the 10.7B-token OLMo 2 Dolmino Mix Math subset.
evidence.explanation: Confirms that the midtraining mix reused the OLMo 2 Dolmino math subset.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included a modified Stack-Edu slice with 50% fill-in-the-middle transformation and quality filtering; Table 5 reports 10.0B tokens (10.0%).

evidence.excerpt: Code StackEdu (FIM)ˆ 21.4B 32M 10.0B (10.0%) 16.2M
evidence.explanation: Shows StackEdu (FIM) as a leaf of the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: 50% of documents reflect fill-in-the-middle (FIM) transformation
evidence.explanation: Specifies the FIM-transformed nature of this Stack-Edu variant.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included CraneCode, AI2's open reproduction of SwallowCode over filtered Python from The Stack v2 Smol; Table 5 reports 10.0B tokens (10.0%).

evidence.excerpt: Python (synth) CraneCode* 18.8B 19.7M 10.0B (10.0%) 11.7M
evidence.explanation: Places CraneCode in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: we also created a fully-open replica of SwallowCode ... which we call CraneCode
evidence.explanation: Confirms CraneCode's identity as the reproduced synthetic code dataset.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included Reddit-to-Flashcards, synthetic MCQA rewritten from academically relevant subreddit submission-comment pairs; Table 5 reports 5.90B tokens (5.9%).

evidence.excerpt: QA (synth) Reddit To Flashcards** 21.6B 370M 5.90B (5.9%) 101M
evidence.explanation: Shows Reddit-to-Flashcards in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: use GPT 4o-mini to rewrite submission-comment pairs ... into multiple-choice QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Explains what this dataset contains.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included Wiki-to-RCQA, reading-comprehension QA pairs synthesized from Wikipedia passages; Table 5 reports 3.0B tokens (3.0%).

evidence.excerpt: QA (synth) Wiki To RCQA** 4.22B 22.3M 3.0B (3.0%) 16.3M
evidence.explanation: Shows Wiki-to-RCQA in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: We collect Wikipedia passages and prompted Qwen2.5 32B Instruct to generate QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Explains the source material and function of Wiki-to-RCQA.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining used only the 'diverse QA pairs' synthetic subset of NVIDIA's Nemotron CC dataset; Table 5 reports 5.0B tokens (5.0%).

evidence.excerpt: QA (synth) Nemotron Synth QAˆ 487B 972M 5.0B (5.0%) 10.6M
evidence.explanation: Shows Nemotron Synth QA in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: We include the “diverse QA pairs” synth subset of the Nemotron CC dataset
evidence.explanation: Confirms that the object is the Nemotron CC dataset, specifically its diverse-QA subset.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included Math Meta-Reasoning, a new synthetic dataset targeting meta-reasoning capabilities on mathematical tasks; Table 5 reports 381M tokens (0.38%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Math Meta-Reasoning** 1.05B 984K 381M (0.38%) 401K
evidence.explanation: Shows the math meta-reasoning slice in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: Meta-reasoning ... target seven core cognitive capabilities
evidence.explanation: Describes the dataset family and its targeted role.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included Code Meta-Reasoning, the code-focused half of AI2's new meta-reasoning data; Table 5 reports 459M tokens (0.46%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Code Meta-Reasoning** 1.27B 910K 459M (0.46%) 398K
evidence.explanation: Shows the code meta-reasoning slice in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: Table 44 Meta reasoning capabilities across coding tasks.
evidence.explanation: Grounds the coding side of the meta-reasoning dataset family used in Table 5.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included Program-Verifiable data, AI2's synthetic reasoning dataset with Python-verifiable correctness; Table 5 reports 159M tokens (0.16%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Program-Verifiable** 438M 384K 159M (0.16%) 158K
evidence.explanation: Shows Program-Verifiable data in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: Our second new synthetic reasoning dataset consists of program-verifiable tasks
evidence.explanation: Defines the dataset used for this leaf.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included the Full-Thoughts rewrite of OpenMathReasoning; Table 5 reports 850M tokens (0.85%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) OMR Rewrite FullThoughtsˆ 850M 291K 850M (0.85%) 394K
evidence.explanation: Shows the OMR rewrite leaf in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: we call the Full-Thoughts rewrite
evidence.explanation: Names the exact rewritten OpenMathReasoning variant used.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included the QwQ-only subset of OpenMathReasoning; Table 5 reports 1.87B tokens (1.87%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) QWQ Reasoning Tracesˆ 4.77B 438K 1.87B (1.87%) 401K
evidence.explanation: Shows the QwQ reasoning-trace slice in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: QwQ Reasoning Traces consists of the QwQ subset of the OpenMathReasoning dataset
evidence.explanation: Specifies the source and identity of this leaf.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included GeneralReasoningMix, AI2's compilation of three existing reasoning-trace datasets; Table 5 reports 1.87B tokens (1.87%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) General Reasoning Mixˆ 2.48B 668K 1.87B (1.87%) 732K
evidence.explanation: Shows General Reasoning Mix in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: GeneralReasoningMix is a compilation of three existing datasets
evidence.explanation: Confirms the dataset is an internal compilation rather than a single upstream corpus.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included an external Gemini reasoning-trace dataset attributed to Muennighoff et al. (2025b); Table 5 reports 246M tokens (0.25%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Gemini Reasoning Tracesˆ 246M 55.2K 246M (0.25%)) 85.1K
evidence.explanation: Shows the Gemini reasoning-trace leaf in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: Gemini Reasoning Traces, introduced by Muennighoff et al. (2025b)
evidence.explanation: Identifies the upstream artifact family used for this leaf.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included the reasoning-trace portion of NVIDIA's Llama-Nemotron Post-Training Dataset; Table 5 reports 1.25B tokens (1.25%).

evidence.location: Table 5, page 20, row 'Llama Nemotron Reasoning Traces'
evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) Llama Nemotron Reasoning Tracesˆ 20.9B 3.91M 1.25B (1.25%) 368K
evidence.explanation: Shows the Llama Nemotron reasoning-trace leaf in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: Llama Nemotron Reasoning Traces ... contains thinking trace data for math, code, general reasoning, and instruction following.
evidence.explanation: Matches the leaf to NVIDIA's released post-training dataset.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included OpenThoughts2 reasoning traces; Table 5 reports 1.25B tokens (1.25%).

evidence.excerpt: Thinking (synth) OpenThoughts2 Reasoning Tracesˆ 5.6B 1.11M 1.25B (1.25%) 402K
evidence.explanation: Shows OpenThoughts2 reasoning traces in the final mix.

evidence.excerpt: OpenThoughts2 Reasoning Traces ... contains thinking traces in domains of math, science, code, and puzzles.
evidence.explanation: Identifies the upstream dataset used for this leaf.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included a Tulu 3 SFT instruction-data slice; Table 5 reports 1.1B tokens (1.1%).

evidence.excerpt: Instruction (synth) Tulu 3 SFTˆˆ 1.61B 1.95M 1.1B (1.1%) 1.45M
evidence.explanation: Shows Tulu 3 SFT as an instruction-data leaf in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: # Tulu 3 SFT Mixture
evidence.explanation: Grounds the upstream released dataset corresponding to the paper's 'Tulu 3 SFT' name.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included the Dolmino Flan instruction slice reused from OLMo 2; Table 5 reports 5.0B tokens (5.0%).

evidence.excerpt: Instruction (synth) Dolmino 1 Flanˆˆ 16.8B 56.9M 5.0B (5.0%) 14.8M
evidence.explanation: Shows Dolmino Flan as an instruction-data leaf in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: we also find the Flan dataset ... and as a result included a subset of the Flan dataset in the final mix.
evidence.explanation: Confirms that a Flan-derived instruction slice entered the final midtraining mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included a high-quality subset of stage-1 olmOCR science PDFs; Table 5 reports 4.99B tokens (5.0%).

evidence.location: Table 5, page 20, row 'olmOCR science PDFs (HQ subset)'
evidence.excerpt: PDFs olmOCR science PDFs (HQ subset)ˆ 240B 28.7M 4.99B (5.0%) 1.20M
evidence.explanation: Shows the HQ PDF subset as a leaf in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: we create a further filtered version, which we use both for midtraining and for long-context extension
evidence.explanation: Explains that the HQ PDF subset is reused across stages 2 and 3.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included the STEM-Heavy Crawl, an in-house high-quality crawl of scientific, educational, and general domains; Table 5 reports 4.99B tokens (5.0%).

evidence.excerpt: Web pages STEM-Heavy Crawlˆ 5.21B 5.16M 4.99B (5.0%) 5.53M
evidence.explanation: Shows STEM-Heavy Crawl in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: We also create a separate high-quality web collection, crawled ... using our in-house crawler.
evidence.explanation: Defines the internal crawl named in Table 5.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-2 midtraining included a high-quality Common Crawl subset from the top two quality buckets; Table 5 reports 22.4B tokens (22.5%).

evidence.excerpt: Web pages Common Crawl (HQ subset)ˆ 1.32T 965M 22.4B (22.5%) 18.3M
evidence.explanation: Shows the high-quality Common Crawl subset in the final midtraining mix.

evidence.excerpt: We sample documents from the top two quality buckets (top 10% quality).
evidence.explanation: Defines the HQ Common Crawl subset used in stage-2 midtraining.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension trained OLMo 3 32B on the 100B-token Dolma 3 Longmino Mix to reach 65,536 context length.

evidence.excerpt: The Dolma 3 Longmino Mix (100B) is the mixture of data used for the third stage of training for Olmo 3 32B model.
evidence.explanation: Directly states that this 100B mix was the stage-3 training dataset for the subject.

evidence.excerpt: train using this mix for an additional ... 100B tokens for Olmo 3 32B
evidence.explanation: Confirms the 32B token budget and stage-3 use.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension sampled natural olmOCR PDF documents in the 8K-16K bucket; Table 11 shows 4.55% of the 50B mix, with the 100B 32B mix keeping the same proportions.

evidence.explanation: Places the 8K-16K natural PDF bucket in the Longmino Mix used for stage-3 training.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension sampled natural olmOCR PDF documents in the 16K-32K bucket; Table 11 shows 3.70% of the mix.

evidence.explanation: Shows the 16K-32K natural PDF bucket in the Longmino Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension sampled natural olmOCR PDF documents in the 32K-64K bucket; Table 11 shows 9.63% of the mix.

evidence.explanation: Shows the 32K-64K natural PDF bucket in the Longmino Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension included synthetic Common Word Extraction (CWE) tasks injected into 32K-64K PDF documents; Table 11 shows 3.88% of the mix.

evidence.location: Table 11, page 29, row 'olmOCR PDFs + synth CWE 32K-64K'
evidence.excerpt: olmOCR PDFs + synth CWE 32K-64K 8.77B (1.37%) 189K 1.94B (3.88%) 71.3K
evidence.explanation: Shows the synthetic CWE bucket in the Longmino Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Stage-3 long-context extension included synthetic Rewriting EXpressions (REX) tasks injected into 32K-64K PDF documents; Table 11 shows 12.2% of the mix.

evidence.location: Table 11, page 29, row 'olmOCR PDFs + synth REX 32K-64K'
evidence.excerpt: olmOCR PDFs + synth REX 32K-64K 24.1B (3.77%) 492K 6.08B (12.2%) 217K
evidence.explanation: Shows the synthetic REX bucket in the Longmino Mix.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: The subject's PDF-derived training text was produced by the first version of olmOCR during stage-1, and the same PDF pipeline fed later HQ/long-context PDF pools.

evidence.excerpt: We process all PDFs using the first version of olmOCR ... We then extract text using olmOCR
evidence.explanation: Shows that olmOCR converted the PDF corpus into training text.

evidence.location: Model card, model tree / training dataset
evidence.excerpt: ## Model tree for allenai/olmOCR-7B-0225-preview ... ## Dataset used to train ... allenai/olmOCR-mix-0225
evidence.explanation: Grounds the authoritative olmOCR release used as the transformer model.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Language identification with fastText filtered the web corpus to English before pretraining; the same family of filter was also used on PDF born-digital text.

evidence.excerpt: We then use a fastText classifier ... to identify the language of each document, keeping only documents that contain English text.
evidence.explanation: Directly states that a fastText LID model filtered pretraining data.

evidence.excerpt: lid.176 from fasttext.cc/docs/en/language-identification
evidence.explanation: Identifies the specific fastText language-identification model family used.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: AI2's distilled fastText WebOrganizer topic classifier partitioned the deduplicated web/PDF corpora into topical buckets that were later mixed into training data.

evidence.excerpt: we distill the transformer-based models ... into a simpler fastText model
evidence.explanation: States that a distilled fastText topic classifier was applied during data preparation.

evidence.excerpt: huggingface.co/allenai/dolma3-fasttext-weborganizer-topic-classifier
evidence.explanation: Identifies the exact released topic-classifier model.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: AI2's fastText quality classifier assigned document quality scores used for pretraining upsampling, the stage-2 HQ Common Crawl subset, and the stem-heavy crawl threshold.

evidence.excerpt: We also train and apply a fastText-based quality classifier to assign each document a quality score.
evidence.explanation: Directly states that a fastText quality classifier shaped training-data inclusion and weighting.

evidence.excerpt: huggingface.co/allenai/dolma3-fasttext-quality-classifier
evidence.explanation: Identifies the exact released quality-classifier model.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Gemma 3 12B classified first PDF pages for sensitive-PII / public-dissemination decisions inside the PDF-filtering pipeline that produced the subject's PDF training pools.

evidence.excerpt: First we classify documents using a prompt to Gemma 3 12B
evidence.explanation: Directly states Gemma 3 12B was used to filter PDF documents for the training pool.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Gemma 3 4B classified the first 5,000 characters of each PDF to assign document-type flags used in the PDF PII/publication filter that shaped the subject's training pools.

evidence.excerpt: Next, we use Gemma 3 4B on the first 5,000 characters of each document
evidence.explanation: Directly states Gemma 3 4B was part of the PDF filtering pipeline.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen3 rewrote existing math web text into CraneMath and MegaMatt during stage-2 data construction.

evidence.excerpt: rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt, using Qwen3
evidence.explanation: Shows Qwen3 as the model used to rewrite FineMath into CraneMath.

evidence.excerpt: rewrite it using Qwen3 ... we refer to as MegaMatt
evidence.explanation: Shows the same Qwen3 family also rewrote MegaMath-Web-Pro into MegaMatt.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct ran the two-stage SwallowCode-style rewriting pipeline that produced CraneCode.

evidence.excerpt: using the prompts from the original SwallowCode paper and Qwen/Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
evidence.explanation: Directly identifies the exact model used for CraneCode rewriting.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: GPT-4o mini rewrote Reddit submission-comment pairs into the Reddit-to-Flashcards MCQA training dataset.

evidence.excerpt: use GPT 4o-mini to rewrite submission-comment pairs ... into multiple-choice QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Directly states GPT-4o mini transformed Reddit content into training QA examples.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: Qwen2.5 32B Instruct generated QA pairs for the Wiki-to-RCQA midtraining dataset from Wikipedia passages.

evidence.excerpt: prompted Qwen2.5 32B Instruct to generate QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Directly states Qwen2.5 32B Instruct generated the Wiki-to-RCQA examples.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: GPT-4.1 generated meta-reasoning traces and program-verifiable reasoning traces during stage-2 data construction.

evidence.excerpt: we prompt GPT-4.1 and o4-mini to generate thinking traces
evidence.explanation: Shows GPT-4.1 generated meta-reasoning training traces.

evidence.excerpt: distill thinking traces from GPT-4.1 and o4-mini models
evidence.explanation: Shows GPT-4.1 also generated program-verifiable traces.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: o4-mini generated meta-reasoning traces and program-verifiable reasoning traces during stage-2 data construction.

evidence.excerpt: we prompt GPT-4.1 and o4-mini to generate thinking traces
evidence.explanation: Shows o4-mini generated meta-reasoning traces.

evidence.excerpt: distill thinking traces from GPT-4.1 and o4-mini models
evidence.explanation: Shows o4-mini also generated program-verifiable traces.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: GPT-4.1 lightly rewrote OpenMathReasoning items into the OMR Full-Thoughts training slice while preserving their reasoning content.

evidence.excerpt: instructing GPT-4.1 to edit items for clarity, flow, and formatting
evidence.explanation: Directly states GPT-4.1 transformed OpenMathReasoning into the Full-Thoughts rewrite.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: OLMo 2 Instruct 32B generated the synthetic long-context aggregation tasks (CWE and REX) injected into Longmino's 32K-64K PDF partitions.

evidence.excerpt: we ultimately use OLMo 2 Instruct 32B for all generations
evidence.explanation: Directly states that OLMo 2 Instruct 32B generated the synthetic long-context tasks.

evidence.excerpt: CWE ... prompt OLMo 2 Instruct ... REX ... prompt OLMo 2 Instruct
evidence.explanation: Names the generated task families produced by that model.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: TinyMATH-PoT and TinyMATH-MIND were created by transforming the MATH training set into many new problems and solutions; the subject consumed those transformed derivatives, not raw MATH directly.

evidence.excerpt: For each of the 7500 examples in the MATH training set, we generate 100 new, similar problems
evidence.explanation: Shows that MATH served as the source dataset transformed into TinyMATH.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneMath was built by rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt, so FineMath is a direct source dataset for training data consumed by the subject.

evidence.excerpt: rewriting FineMath4+ with the SwallowMath prompt
evidence.explanation: Directly states FineMath4+ was rewritten into CraneMath.

evidence.excerpt: FineMath-4+ (a subset of FineMath-3+): 9.6B tokens
evidence.explanation: Grounds FineMath4+ as a released subset of the FineMath dataset.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: MegaMatt rewrote recent MegaMath-Web-Pro documents, making MegaMath the direct source dataset for this training slice.

evidence.excerpt: Megamath-Web-Pro-Max ... applies Llama rewrites to ... MegaMath-Web
evidence.explanation: Shows MegaMatt traces back to MegaMath-Web-Pro / MegaMath-Web source material.

evidence.excerpt: we collect the Megamath-Web-Pro data ... and rewrite it using Qwen3
evidence.explanation: Confirms MegaMath-Web-Pro content was rewritten into the MegaMatt slice.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneCode started from Python files in The Stack v2 Smol and rewrote them through a two-stage style/optimization pipeline.

evidence.excerpt: we source data from the Python subset of the-stack-v2-smol
evidence.explanation: Shows The Stack v2 Smol as the source dataset transformed into CraneCode.

evidence.excerpt: starting with just the python files from The Stack v2 Smol
evidence.explanation: Confirms CraneCode was built by transforming Stack v2 Smol Python files.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b

evidence.excerpt: We collect Wikipedia passages and prompted Qwen2.5 32B Instruct to generate QA pairs
evidence.explanation: Shows Wikipedia was the source corpus transformed into the Wiki-to-RCQA training slice.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b

evidence.excerpt: huggingface.co/datasets/pandalla/pandalla-math-dataset-v1.0

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b
edges.description: CraneMath explicitly borrowed the SwallowMath prompt/rewriting recipe while replacing its non-permissive Llama-based generations with AI2's own open-model reproduction.

evidence.explanation: Directly states that the CraneMath recipe borrowed the SwallowMath prompt.

evidence.explanation: Confirms the upstream artifact is the released SwallowMath dataset/recipe family.

edges.subject: allenai/olmo-3-1125-32b

evidence.excerpt: stage3-llm-score ... stage4-llm-rewrite
evidence.explanation: Grounds the released upstream SwallowCode-v2 artifact corresponding to the borrowed pipeline.
